mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE permit_type = #{permitType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE permit_type = #{permitType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE permit_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_permit_to_work ( permit_id, permit_type, risk_level, status, title, description, work_location, work_start_date, work_end_date, requester_name, requester_dept, requester_id, approver_name, approver_dept, approver_id, safety_measures, required_ppe, hazard_factors, emergency_contact, workers_count, notes, checklist_template_id, inspector_name, is_external, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{permitId}, #{permitType}, #{riskLevel}, #{status}, #{title}, #{description}, #{workLocation}, #{workStartDate}, #{workEndDate}, #{requesterName}, #{requesterDept}, #{requesterId}, #{approverName}, #{approverDept}, #{approverId}, #{safetyMeasures}, #{requiredPpe}, #{hazardFactors}, #{emergencyContact}, #{workersCount}, #{notes}, #{checklistTemplateId}, #{inspectorName}, #{isExternal}, #{planApproverUserId}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_to_work SET permit_type = #{permitType}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, status = #{status}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, work_location = #{workLocation}, work_start_date = #{workStartDate}, work_end_date = #{workEndDate}, requester_name = #{requesterName}, requester_dept = #{requesterDept}, requester_id = #{requesterId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, approver_dept = #{approverDept}, approver_id = #{approverId}, safety_measures = #{safetyMeasures}, required_ppe = #{requiredPpe}, hazard_factors = #{hazardFactors}, emergency_contact = #{emergencyContact}, workers_count = #{workersCount}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, notes = #{notes}, checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId}, inspector_name = #{inspectorName}, is_external = #{isExternal}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_permit_to_work SET status = #{status}, plan_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'approve' THEN GETDATE() ELSE plan_approved_at END, plan_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'approve' AND #{actor} IS NOT NULL THEN #{actor} ELSE plan_approved_by END, completion_approved_at = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'complete' THEN GETDATE() ELSE completion_approved_at END, completion_approved_by = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'complete' AND #{actor} IS NOT NULL THEN #{actor} ELSE completion_approved_by END, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'complete' THEN GETDATE() ELSE completed_at END, reject_reason = CASE WHEN #{action} = 'reject' THEN #{rejectReason} WHEN #{action} = 'submit' OR #{action} = 'completionSubmit' THEN NULL ELSE reject_reason END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_permit_to_work SET status = #{status}, approved_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'APPROVED' THEN GETDATE() ELSE approved_at END, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN GETDATE() ELSE completed_at END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_permit_to_work SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE is_external = #{isExternal} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE is_external = #{isExternal} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_permit_to_work SET total_checklist = #{totalChecklist}, completed_checklist = #{completedChecklist}, finding_count = #{findingCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_permit_to_work WHERE checklist_template_id = #{checklistTemplateId} AND deleted = 0
